title: Minecraft 26.1 Release Candidate 1
author: Java Team
imageAltText: A large group of baby chickens is congregating in a Meadows biome

blocks.source_text: Today we are shipping the first release candidate for 26.1 and the Tiny Takeover game drop! If no critical issues are found, this will be the version that we ship for the eventual full release.
blocks.translated_text: 今天我们发布了 26.1 的第一个发布候选版本以及 Tiny Takeover 游戏投放！如果未发现严重问题，这将是我们用于最终正式发布的版本。

blocks.source_text: Release Candidates are available for Minecraft: Java Edition. To install the Release Candidate, open up the [Minecraft Launcher](https://www.minecraft.net/content/minecraft-net/language-masters/download) and enable snapshots in the "Installations" tab.
blocks.translated_text: 发布候选版本适用于 Minecraft：Java 版。要安装发布候选版本，请打开 [Minecraft Launcher](https://www.minecraft.net/content/minecraft-net/language-masters/download) 并在“安装”选项卡中启用快照。

blocks.source_text: Testing versions can corrupt your world, so please backup and/or run them in a different folder from your main worlds.
blocks.translated_text: 测试版本可能会损坏你的世界，请务必备份并/或将其放在与主世界不同的文件夹中运行。

blocks.source_text: For any feedback and suggestions, head over to the [Feedback site](https://feedback.minecraft.net/) . If you're feeling chatty, join us over at the  [official Minecraft Discord](https://discordapp.com/invite/minecraft) .
blocks.translated_text: 如有任何反馈或建议，请前往 [反馈网站](https://feedback.minecraft.net/)。如果想随便聊聊，欢迎加入我们的[官方 Minecraft Discord](https://discordapp.com/invite/minecraft)。

content:
Today we are shipping the first release candidate for 26.1 and the Tiny Takeover game drop! If no critical issues are found, this will be the version that we ship for the eventual full release.

Happy mining!

Get the Release Candidate

Release Candidates are available for Minecraft: Java Edition. To install the Release Candidate, open up the [Minecraft Launcher](https://www.minecraft.net/content/minecraft-net/language-masters/download) and enable snapshots in the "Installations" tab.

Testing versions can corrupt your world, so please backup and/or run them in a different folder from your main worlds.

Cross-platform server jar:

[Minecraft server jar](https://piston-data.mojang.com/v1/objects/5f282bb1d2ca058ef0c31a42be5b9ad69bc9cea3/server.jar)

Report bugs here:

[Minecraft issue tracker](https://bugs.mojang.com/projects/MC/summary) !

Want to give feedback?

For any feedback and suggestions, head over to the [Feedback site](https://feedback.minecraft.net/) . If you're feeling chatty, join us over at the  [official Minecraft Discord](https://discordapp.com/invite/minecraft) .
translated_content:
今天我们发布了 26.1 的第一个发布候选版本以及 Tiny Takeover 游戏投放！如果未发现严重问题，这将是我们用于最终正式发布的版本。

挖矿愉快！

获取发布候选版本

发布候选版本适用于 Minecraft：Java 版。要安装发布候选版本，请打开 [Minecraft Launcher](https://www.minecraft.net/content/minecraft-net/language-masters/download) 并在“安装”选项卡中启用快照。

测试版本可能会损坏你的世界，请务必备份并/或将其放在与主世界不同的文件夹中运行。

跨平台服务器 jar：

[Minecraft 服务器 jar](https://piston-data.mojang.com/v1/objects/5f282bb1d2ca058ef0c31a42be5b9ad69bc9cea3/server.jar)

在此报告错误：

[Minecraft 问题跟踪器](https://bugs.mojang.com/projects/MC/summary) !

想要提供反馈吗？

如有任何反馈或建议，请前往 [反馈网站](https://feedback.minecraft.net/)。如果想随便聊聊，欢迎加入我们的[官方 Minecraft Discord](https://discordapp.com/invite/minecraft)。
